svg.title: Autonomous Drone RL Sim-to-Real Pipeline
svg.desc: End-to-end pipeline from environment setup through sim-to-real transfer and deployment

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about MuJoCo physics simulation for drones')
sendPrompt('How does Unreal Engine integrate with MuJoCo for photorealistic drone simulation?')
sendPrompt('What sensor models should I simulate for a drone RL project?')
sendPrompt('How do I model drone dynamics and aerodynamics in MuJoCo?')
sendPrompt('What actuator and motor models should I use for a quadrotor drone simulation?')
sendPrompt('How should I model sensor noise and failure for sim-to-real transfer?')
sendPrompt('What observation and action spaces should I use for drone navigation RL?')
sendPrompt('How should I design a reward function for autonomous drone navigation?')
sendPrompt('Which RL algorithm is best for drone navigation — PPO, SAC, or TD3?')
sendPrompt('What is domain randomization and how do I apply it to drone RL?')
sendPrompt('How does adaptive domain randomization work for sim-to-real transfer?')
sendPrompt('What is system identification for sim-to-real and how do I implement it for drones?')
sendPrompt('How do I export a trained RL policy for edge deployment on a drone?')
sendPrompt('What onboard compute hardware should I use for running an RL policy on a real drone?')
sendPrompt('What safety systems should I add for autonomous drone deployment?')
sendPrompt('What metrics should I track when evaluating a drone RL policy?')
sendPrompt('How do I close the loop between real flight data and sim retraining?')
sendPrompt('How do I do continual learning for a deployed drone policy?')
